nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=46 beats='Clover the little bear cub spreads a checked blanket in the sunny meadow for a teddy bears picnic; the basket is empty and no friends are here yet; she claps her paws and decides what to fetch first'>>

choices.label: Go ask the bees for honey.
Go pick red berries at the bramble.
Go find the big red ball.
Go fetch the bright paper kite.
Go wake sleepy Owl in the oak.
Go find the little music box.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Clover pads to the round beehive to ask for a pot of golden honey; the bees hum kindly in the sun; she can ask nicely and wait or poke the hive to hurry them along'>>

choices.label: Ask the bees nicely and wait.
Poke the hive to hurry.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the bees fill a little pot with warm golden honey and Clover hugs it close; the picnic is growing; she can carry it back to the blanket or call the bears and start the picnic now'>>

choices.label: Carry the honey back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Clover pokes the hive and out floats a puff of buzzy bees that chase her in a silly circle round the meadow; nobody is stung and she giggles, trotting back to the blanket to try again the gentle way'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Clover skips to the bramble bush for a basket of red berries; plump ripe ones sit low and shiny; she can pick the easy low berries or stretch up for the wobbly high ones'>>

choices.label: Pick the easy low berries.
Stretch for the wobbly high ones.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='Clovers basket fills with sweet red berries that stain her paws pink; the picnic keeps growing; she can carry them back to the blanket or call the bears and start the picnic now'>>

choices.label: Carry the berries back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Clover stretches for the high berries, the branch springs back, and the whole basket tips into the soft grass with a plop; the berries roll everywhere and she laughs, heading back to the blanket to start over'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Clover remembers the big red ball is somewhere in the tall meadow grass; she hunts for it happily; she can follow the little bounce marks or just dive into the grass headfirst'>>

choices.label: Follow the little bounce marks.
Dive into the tall grass.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='there in the grass sits the shiny red ball, just right for a picnic game; the fun is growing; she can roll it back to the blanket or call the bears and start the picnic now'>>

choices.label: Roll the ball back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Clover dives into the tall grass and pops up with a ticklish grasshopper on her nose instead of the ball; she sneezes a giggly sneeze and trots back to the blanket to look for the ball again later'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Clover wants the bright paper kite for the breezy meadow; it lies folded by the old wooden fence; she can carry it gently under her arm or let it flap wide open in the wind'>>

choices.label: Carry the kite gently under your arm.
Let the kite flap open in the wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Clover tucks the folded kite safely under her arm, ready for flying; the picnic keeps growing; she can bring it back to the blanket or call the bears and start the picnic now'>>

choices.label: Bring the kite back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Clover lets the kite flap open and a gust tugs it into a giggly tumble that wraps the string around a fence post; she untangles the muddle, laughing, and heads back to the blanket to try again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='sleepy Owl dozes on a branch of the oak and Clover wants to invite him to the picnic; his round eyes are shut tight; she can hoot softly to wake him gently or shake the whole branch'>>

choices.label: Hoot softly to wake Owl gently.
Shake the whole branch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='Owl blinks his big eyes, yawns, and says yes to the picnic with a happy hoot; the friends are growing; Clover can walk him back to the blanket or call the bears and start the picnic now'>>

choices.label: Walk Owl back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Clover shakes the branch and a shower of crunchy leaves tumbles down and buries her in a giggly pile; Owl only snores a little louder; she brushes off the leaves and heads back to the blanket to try again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Clover looks for the little music box to play picnic tunes; it sits closed on a mossy stump; she can lift the lid carefully and peek inside or give the handle a big fast wind'>>

choices.label: Lift the lid carefully.
Give the handle a big fast wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the music box tinkles a soft, sweet picnic tune and Clover hums along; the picnic keeps growing; she can carry it back to the blanket or call the bears and start the picnic now'>>

choices.label: Carry the music box back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Clover winds the handle too fast and the music box plays a silly, speedy, jumbled tune that makes her paws dance all wrong; she giggles at the muddle and heads back to the blanket to try again slowly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='Clover rings the little picnic bell and teddy bears come waddling from every corner of the meadow; the blanket is ready at last; she waves them all over to the sunny checked blanket'>>

choices.label: Welcome the teddy bears in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the teddy bears settle in a happy ring on the blanket, wiggling with excitement; everything Clover fetched is piled up in the middle; she looks at the growing feast and gets ready to begin'>>

choices.label: Lay out all the picnic treats.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Clover spreads out the honey pot, the red berries, and all the treats in the warm sun; the friends lick their lips and wiggle their paws; she decides how to start the picnic fun'>>

choices.label: Share the honey and berries.
Start a picnic game.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='the honey and berries go round the circle and everyone munches happily in the sunshine; the picnic is merry and full; Clover thinks of the coziest way to keep the good fun going'>>

choices.label: Sing the teddy bears' picnic song.
Wind up the music box and sway.
Curl up for a cozy nap in the sun.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=36 beats='the teddy bears are ready to play in the breezy meadow and Clover claps with joy; the picnic is a happy, growing party; she decides which cheerful game the friends should have'>>

choices.label: Roll the big red ball around the ring.
Fly the bright kite in the breeze.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='everyone joins paws and sings the teddy bears picnic song under the warm sun, swaying together in the meadow; Clovers picnic has come together just perfectly, and her heart is as full as the honey pot'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='the little music box tinkles its sweet tune and all the teddy bears sway and hum along on the sunny blanket; Clovers picnic is cozy and complete, and she beams at every one of her happy friends'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='full of honey and berries, the teddy bears and Clover curl up in a soft heap on the warm blanket for a happy afternoon nap; the picnic she built piece by piece is perfect and peaceful'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='the big red ball rolls round and round the giggling ring of teddy bears in the sunny meadow; Clovers picnic is a bouncy, happy success and all the friends cheer for one more roll'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='the bright kite dips and soars over the meadow while the teddy bears cheer from the blanket; Clovers picnic has come together beautifully and she flies the kite proudly in the warm breeze'>>
